'''ât-t-k-w''' ('''katatkewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hoast|hoast]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-t-k-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hoast|hoast]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-t-k-w
|-
! Lemma
| katatkewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitatkewoko|thitatkewoko]] || [[word:jitatkewoko|jitatkewoko]] || [[word:shitatkewoko|shitatkewoko]] || [[word:kitatkewoko|kitatkewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutatkewoko|thuthutatkewoko]] || [[word:jujutatkewoko|jujutatkewoko]] || [[word:shushutatkewoko|shushutatkewoko]] || [[word:kukutatkewoko|kukutatkewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutatkewoko|thutatkewoko]] || [[word:jutatkewoko|jutatkewoko]] || [[word:shutatkewoko|shutatkewoko]] || [[word:kutatkewoko|kutatkewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutatkewoko|thutatkewoko]] || [[word:jutatkewoko|jutatkewoko]] || [[word:shutatkewoko|shutatkewoko]] || [[word:kutatkewoko|kutatkewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetatkewoko|thetatkewoko]] || [[word:jetatkewoko|jetatkewoko]] || [[word:shetatkewoko|shetatkewoko]] || [[word:ketatkewoko|ketatkewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotatkewoko|thothotatkewoko]] || [[word:jojotatkewoko|jojotatkewoko]] || [[word:shoshotatkewoko|shoshotatkewoko]] || [[word:kokotatkewoko|kokotatkewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotatkewoko|thotatkewoko]] || [[word:jotatkewoko|jotatkewoko]] || [[word:shotatkewoko|shotatkewoko]] || [[word:kotatkewoko|kotatkewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotatkewoko|thotatkewoko]] || [[word:jotatkewoko|jotatkewoko]] || [[word:shotatkewoko|shotatkewoko]] || [[word:kotatkewoko|kotatkewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtatkewoko|thĂŠtatkewoko]] || [[word:jĂŠtatkewoko|jĂŠtatkewoko]] || [[word:shĂŠtatkewoko|shĂŠtatkewoko]] || [[word:kĂŠtatkewoko|kĂŠtatkewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatatkewoko|thathatatkewoko]] || [[word:jajatatkewoko|jajatatkewoko]] || [[word:shashatatkewoko|shashatatkewoko]] || [[word:kakatatkewoko|kakatatkewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatatkewoko|thatatkewoko]] || [[word:jatatkewoko|jatatkewoko]] || [[word:shatatkewoko|shatatkewoko]] || [[word:katatkewoko|katatkewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatatkewoko|thatatkewoko]] || [[word:jatatkewoko|jatatkewoko]] || [[word:shatatkewoko|shatatkewoko]] || [[word:katatkewoko|katatkewoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
